items.title: 'The time is now': Inside the Darryn Peterson availability saga at Kansas
items.description: The projected No. 1 NBA draft pick has sat out enough time to cast uncertainty on his team's potential in March.

items.title: Duke back atop AP men's poll thanks to U-M win
items.description: Duke's win against Michigan has propelled the Blue Devils to a familiar perch: No. 1 in the AP men's college basketball poll.

items.title: Source: Falcons to place franchise tag on Pitts
items.description: The Falcons plan to place the franchise tag on tight end Kyle Pitts Sr., a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.

items.title: KD eyes '28 Games, bemoans U.S. hoops critics
items.description: Kevin Durant told ESPN that he plans to play in the 2028 Summer Games in Los Angeles.
